full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-20945

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-20945.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
vim-X11-8.2.2637-23.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
vim-common-8.2.2637-23.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
vim-enhanced-8.2.2637-23.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
vim-filesystem-8.2.2637-23.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
vim-minimal-8.2.2637-23.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
vim-X11-8.2.2637-23.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
vim-common-8.2.2637-23.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
vim-enhanced-8.2.2637-23.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
vim-filesystem-8.2.2637-23.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
vim-minimal-8.2.2637-23.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/vim-8.2.2637-23.0.1.el9_7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-53905
CVE-2025-53906




Description of changes:

[8.2.2637-23.0.1]
- Remove upstream references [Orabug: 31197557]

[2:8.2.2637-23]
- RHEL-112005 CVE-2025-53905 vim: Vim path traversial
- RHEL-112009 CVE-2025-53906 vim: Vim path traversal
